creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
On Tue, 8 Feb 2011, David Naylor wrote:
> Do you have a server to host some packages on (the i386 packages from
> the FreeBSD build infrastructure)?

Hmm, I am wondering, could you leverage pkg_add -r or something like
that?  --dry-run perhaps, if you just want to get the URL?

Gerald
